title: Component Tree
description: Sketch a logical component hierarchy for a simple search input and result list.
problemStatement:
Think before you code! Imagine a Search app. Write a comment inside your component describing the hierarchy of `SearchBar`, `FilterableProductTable`, and `ProductList`.

**Requirement:** Order them from top (parent) to bottom (deepest child).
hints: Good React apps start with a solid design of the component structure.
expectedOutput: A comment block with the correct hierarchy
